name: Topstep
description_short: Veteran futures prop firm with a structured Trading Combine evaluation, risk management coaching, and funded accounts up to $150K.
description_long:
Topstep is one of the original and most respected futures-focused proprietary trading firms, founded in 2012 in Chicago. The firm pioneered the online prop firm evaluation model and has funded thousands of traders through its Trading Combine program.

The evaluation process involves trading a simulated futures account while meeting profit targets and adhering to risk rules. Topstep offers account sizes of $50K, $100K, and $150K. The key differentiator is Topstep's focus on risk management — the firm provides coaching, performance analytics, and daily loss limits designed to instill disciplined trading habits. Traders must demonstrate consistent profitability rather than hitting profit targets through one or two lucky trades.

Once funded, traders receive a 100% profit split on the first $5,000, then 90/10 thereafter. Payouts are processed quickly, and funded traders can withdraw profits at any time. Topstep supports trading through NinjaTrader, Tradovate, and other major futures platforms. The firm has a strong community with live trading rooms, educational webinars, and an active Discord.
pros: One of the most established and trusted prop firms
Strong emphasis on risk management and trader development
Active community with live trading rooms
cons: Futures only — no forex or equities
Evaluation rules can be restrictive (consistency requirement)
Monthly fees accumulate during evaluation period
Smaller maximum account size than some competitors
